meta.direction: Quiet, editorial, gallery-neutral. Work rooted in looking.

archetype.rationale: Creator (the making/looking practice) lead; Sage (perception, the gaze, identity) secondary — from the artist's own statement.

identity.essence: Quiet, editorial, gallery-neutral. Work rooted in looking.
identity.positioning: Madrid-based visual artist presenting contemporary painting with curatorial restraint.

principles: Give each artwork room to breathe; the work leads and the layout recedes.
Mirror the structure of a professional art portfolio; the website's sections define the document's sections.
Source every fact, title, and description only from Rebeca's own input and website; never invent copy.
Attribute each description to its correct artwork.
signatureElements: Generous white space on a pure white ground
Thin, even margins on every side; images contained, never bleeding to the edge
Faithful image reproduction at true aspect ratio
antiPatterns: Full-bleed images or any bleed to the page edges
Stretched or distorted images (any change to the true aspect ratio)
Invented or unsourced titles, descriptions, or copy

evidence.note: Client email 2026-06-16 (subject 'Re: Setting up your branded workspace'): well curated, spacious, contemporary and professional... all the texts justified, the artworks with space to breathe... thin margins in the borders (no bleeding to the sides)... no dropshadows or additional nonsense. do not stretch the images either, keep everything faithful... source all the info ONLY from my imput and website.
